svg.title: Orbit — Message Status State Machine
svg.text: EDITED overlaps the delivery lifecycle — it
does not replace it. A message can be
edited: Boolean field, not a single enum.
DELETED is NOT orthogonal — it terminates
DELIVERED client-side only — no DB field
READ when any member opens convo
INVALID TRANSITIONS (MessageService must reject with 409 Conflict)
→ SENT STOMP receipt to sender with full message object
